Class DRFormatField

java.lang.Object
ch.unibas.medizin.dynamicreports.report.base.component.DRComponent
ch.unibas.medizin.dynamicreports.report.base.component.DRDimensionComponent
ch.unibas.medizin.dynamicreports.report.base.component.DRHyperLinkComponent
ch.unibas.medizin.dynamicreports.report.base.component.DRFormatField
All Implemented Interfaces:
DRIComponent, DRIDimensionComponent, DRIFormatField, DRIHyperLinkComponent, Serializable
Direct Known Subclasses:
DRCurrentDate, DRPageNumber, DRPageXofY, DRTotalPages
public abstract class DRFormatField extends DRHyperLinkComponent implements DRIFormatField

Abstract DRFormatField class.

Author:
Ricardo Mariaca
